content.text: Cluster is up with 5 workers (Phase 1 baseline). Now I'll monitor the traffic generator logs to watch for phase transitions.

input.description: Check traffic generator logs for current phase

LAG=2000 LATENCY=50ms

content.text: Phase 1 active. I'll poll continuously until I detect phase transitions and scale accordingly.

input.command:
# Poll until Phase 2 is detected, then scale
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  LOGS=$(kubectl logs -n spark-streaming -l app=traffic-generator --tail=5 2>&1)
  echo "[$i] $LOGS"
  if echo "$LOGS" | grep -q "PHASE 2"; then
    echo "=== PHASE 2 DETECTED - Scaling to 10 workers ==="
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=10
    echo "=== Scaled to 10 workers ==="
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
input.description: Poll for Phase 2 and scale to 10 workers

content.text: 10 workers confirmed. Now polling for Phase 3.

input.command:
# Poll until Phase 3 is detected, then scale to 20
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  LOGS=$(kubectl logs -n spark-streaming -l app=traffic-generator --tail=5 2>&1)
  echo "[$i] $LOGS"
  if echo "$LOGS" | grep -q "PHASE 3"; then
    echo "=== PHASE 3 DETECTED - Scaling to 20 workers ==="
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=20
    echo "=== Scaled to 20 workers ==="
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
input.description: Poll for Phase 3 and scale to 20 workers

content.text: Phase 3 detected — scaled to 20 workers. Now monitoring for Phase 4 (cooldown).

input.command: kubectl get deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}' 2>&1 && echo ""

# Poll until Phase 4 is detected, then scale back to 5
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  LOGS=$(kubectl logs -n spark-streaming -l app=traffic-generator --tail=5 2>&1)
  echo "[$i] $LOGS"
  if echo "$LOGS" | grep -q "PHASE 4"; then
    echo "=== PHASE 4 DETECTED - Scaling back to 5 workers ==="
    kubectl scale deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming --replicas=5
    echo "=== Scaled to 5 workers ==="
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
input.description: Poll for Phase 4 and scale back to 5 workers

description: Poll for Phase 4 and scale back to 5 workers
